# CLAUDE.md

## Mental Model

A tiny counter module. Increments an integer.

## Repo Map

- `counter.js` — the counter module
- `vitest.config.js` — test configuration
- `CLAUDE.md` — this file

## Test Trees

### Counter

```
Counter
  when created with default
    then value is zero
  when incremented
    then value increases by one
```
